once on Base (Ethereum L2). Cannot be modified post-deployment.         Twenty-four artifact types in eight logical groups:         CONTENT (0-11):      CODE, RESEARCH, DATA, MODEL, AGENT, MEDIA, TEXT, POST, ONCHAIN, REPORT, NOTE, WEBSITE         LIFECYCLE (12):      EVENT         TRANSACTION (13):    RECEIPT         GATED (14-16):       LEGAL, ENTITY, PROOF         SELF-SERVICE (17-18): SEAL, RETRACTION         REVIEW (19-21):      REVIEW, VOID, AFFIRMED         BILLING (22):        ACCOUNT         CATCH-ALL (23):      OTHER         Four register entry points:         registerContent(arId, base, extra)   \u2014 types 0-13, 22, 23 (onlyOperator)         registerGated(arId, base, extra)     \u2014 types 14-16 (onlyLegal/Entity/ProofOperator)         registerTargeted(arId, base, targetArId, extra) \u2014 types 18-21 (onlyOperator)         registerSeal(arId, newTreeRoot, reason, tokenCommitment) \u2014 type 17 (onlyOperator, client authority)","kind":"dev","methods":{"registerContent(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),bytes,bytes32)":{"params":{"arId":"Unique AR-ID for this anchor.","base":"AnchorBase with artifactType, manifestHash, parentArId, etc.","extra":"ABI-encoded type-specific fields (e.g. abi.encode(gitHash, license, language, version, url) for CODE)."}},"registerGated(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),bytes,bytes32)":{"params":{"arId":"Unique AR-ID for this anchor.","base":"AnchorBase with artifactType set to LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF.","extra":"ABI-encoded type-specific fields."}},"registerSeal(string,string,string,bytes32)":{"params":{"arId":"The root AR-ID of the tree to seal (must be a tree root).","newTreeRoot":"Optional continuation pointer to a new tree root.","reason":"Human-readable reason for sealing.","tokenCommitment":"H(K \u2225 C_seal) \u2014 must be non-zero (client-initiated action)."}},"registerTargeted(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),string,bytes,bytes32)":{"params":{"arId":"Unique AR-ID for this anchor.","base":"AnchorBase with artifactType set to RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED.","extra":"ABI-encoded type-specific fields.","targetArId":"The AR-ID being targeted (must exist).","tokenCommitment":"SHA256(ownershipToken + arId) for RETRACTION (user-initiated).                        Must be bytes32(0) for REVIEW, VOID, AFFIRMED (AR governance)."}}},"title":"AnchorRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"registerContent(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),bytes,bytes32)":{"notice":"Register any content, lifecycle, transaction, billing, or catch-all anchor."},"registerGated(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),bytes,bytes32)":{"notice":"Register a gated anchor (LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF)."},"registerSeal(string,string,string,bytes32)":{"notice":"Seal a provenance tree \u2014 authentic and complete.         No new anchors may be appended after sealing.         AR governance (VOID, REVIEW, AFFIRMED) can still target anchors within sealed trees.         SEAL is permanent and cannot be reversed by anyone including AnchorRegistry."},"registerTargeted(string,(uint8,string,string,string,string,string,string),string,bytes,bytes32)":{"notice":"Register a targeted anchor (RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED)."}},"notice":"On-chain registry of artifact provenance anchors.         Immutable record of what existed, when, and who registered it.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/AnchorRegistry.sol":"AnchorRegistry"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AnchorRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf09888eabe4e6ac335d65626864be22623775a94ebaaa466bd6a9d37ea9b3f79","license":"BUSL-1.1","urls":["bzz-raw://965fd4e6f375ef5543ae85e9b2ac0d327601b6c5bd642d11a357145ffaa0912b","dweb:/ipfs/QmR7cYjyzUFQvyS8jwNKC6tNWzLuot6DnnjonTEFxaQhnc"]},"src/AnchorTypes.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1bf3ebaad11bac63b66cd5509393799db3555c750fe72861cdd8f813f580ab2c","license":"BUSL-1.1","urls":["bzz-raw://38c64b96c2a08d5340652a4746b0082e9235855a16cab657c911a41484dcd498","dweb:/ipfs/QmbwduAHBMaaRvtThRyxZ7sXYeeV9GBXeAGQFzmYzzcr8X"]}},"version":1}

params.base: AnchorBase with artifactType, manifestHash, parentArId, etc.
params.extra: ABI-encoded type-specific fields (e.g. abi.encode(gitHash, license, language, version, url) for CODE).

params.base: AnchorBase with artifactType set to LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF.

params.arId: The root AR-ID of the tree to seal (must be a tree root).
params.newTreeRoot: Optional continuation pointer to a new tree root.
params.tokenCommitment: H(K ∥ C_seal) — must be non-zero (client-initiated action).

params.base: AnchorBase with artifactType set to RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED.
params.tokenCommitment: SHA256(ownershipToken + arId) for RETRACTION (user-initiated).                        Must be bytes32(0) for REVIEW, VOID, AFFIRMED (AR governance).

registerContent(string,(uint8,string,str.notice: Register any content, lifecycle, transaction, billing, or catch-all anchor.

registerGated(string,(uint8,string,strin.notice: Register a gated anchor (LEGAL, ENTITY, or PROOF).

registerSeal(string,string,string,bytes3.notice: Seal a provenance tree — authentic and complete.         No new anchors may be appended after sealing.         AR governance (VOID, REVIEW, AFFIRMED) can still target anchors within sealed trees.         SEAL is permanent and cannot be reversed by anyone including AnchorRegistry.

registerTargeted(string,(uint8,string,st.notice: Register a targeted anchor (RETRACTION, REVIEW, VOID, or AFFIRMED).
